title: Software Engineer
description: Develop software demos for customer products

title: Hardware and Software Engineer
description: Developed embedded hardware and firmware for solar-based systems. Designed test and monitoring systems for automation.

title: Mobile Application Developer
description: Designed and implemented Android application for event management. Designed backend architecture for mobile + web application. Created a data management website with different access roles.

title: Engineering Intern – E-waste Recycling Project
description: Part of a team refurbishing e-waste into usable computers for underprivileged communities. Installed dual-boot (Windows 11 + Ubuntu 22) systems for practical learning.

title: Embedded Systems Intern
company: IoT-ra (Internet of Things - Research & Applications) Lab
description: Developed Firmware for power management module. Designed 3d models and operated 3d printer. Field testing and debugging of hive prototypes.

title: Back End Developer
description: Developed Docker Compose environments integrated with GCP services.

title: Engineering Intern – Software Development & Data Analysis
description: Supported data analysis, database design, and automation for E-mobility. Built company site on existing Infra with GoDaddy. Assisted in development of a battery-swapping infrastructure.

title: Project Assistant – Green Hub Kampala (E-Mobility)
description: Supported international collaboration on sustainable E-Mobility solutions.

title: Undergraduate Internship
description: Trained a Runyankore natural voice language model for smart agriculture. Achieved a 50% model accuracy.

title: Internship Coordinator
description: Managed logistics, training schedules, and reporting for the internship program.

title: Generation Connect Youth Envoy
description: Represented youth interests in ICT and digital innovation initiatives. Given insights on youth digital literacy in Uganda.

title: Chairperson, Makerere University Student Branch
description: Led a team of 9 in organizing training and hackathons on Arduino, solar, and leadership. Grew the IEEE membership from 2 to about 70 at peak in my University. Formed 3 more Student chapters. Organised PES Day 2023 with Delegates from Ministry of Energy, GIZ Uganda, AEE and Government representative on Renewable energy. Spearheaded the formation of AEE Makerere University Branch.

title: Communication and Participation Lead
description: Led outreach and volunteer coordination for AI hackathons across Ugandan universities. Attained an in person attendance of about 70 students. Attained 4 universities average attendance in Kampala.

title: Vice Chair, CEDAT Coordinator
description: Awarded most active coordinator during the guild health week for having the largest call out for blood donation. With support from other members coordinated community give back to Katanga.
